summary: Opus 3-tier catalyst sweep (chunk 16 (RLMD-SLB)): scan -> deep -> skeptic

survivors_flagged.one_line: Phase 3 RESCUE registrational trial for NDV-01 (NMIBC) on track to initiate ~mid-2026 (est. ~Jun 30); dated milestone but it's a trial START not a readout, and strong 12-mo P2 data (76-80% CR) already re-rated; well-funded to 2029.
Northern Data all-stock merger signed Nov-2025, expected close Q2-2026; complicated Tether-financed combination - imminent dated merger-arb.
Daraxonrasib RASolute-302 OS win + Breakthrough Therapy; NDA filing imminent/expanded-access granted - dated PDAC binary with first-RAS asymmetry.
China Immunodiagnostics divestiture: LOI signed, definitive agreement expected Q2-2026 (close 2027) - dated but small (~4.5% rev).
Strategic-alternatives review launched Apr-20-2026 (Morgan Stanley + Wachtell) after unsolicited interest + abrupt CEO exit - live process, no timetable.
KSM senior JV-partner deal targeted 1H 2026 + a 2026 spinout, with Sprott royalty financing closed and BC priority-permitting; real structural catalyst on a suppressed developer, soft-dated.

~$42.6B AT&T/SpaceX spectrum sales (FCC-approved) resolving 2026 maturities/going-concern; final AT&T tranches close mid-2026 + SpaceX equity/IPO optionality — partly re-rated but forward closings are dated.
KKR reported in EXCLUSIVE takeover talks (Brookfield also circling) for SBA Communications amid tower-sector consolidation; live, forward merger-arb not yet at definitive agreement.
Santacruz Silver; ~$64.6M Bolivian sovereign cash recovery + Q4 Soracaya launch as dated AISC-compression milestones. Real but soft/operational; stock -16% today, execution-dependent.

Select Medical; $16.50 cash take-private (~$3.9B), HSR cleared Apr-27, awaiting shareholder vote, close mid-2026. Real dated merger-arb but stock $16.54 trades THROUGH deal -> spread gone, upside de-risked.
CSN board-authorized R$15-18B divestiture program (CSN Cement control + Infra stake) with signings targeted Q3/Q4 2026 + $1.4B bridge; levered 3.36x so equity has real deleveraging asymmetry.
Sila Realty Trust being acquired by Blue Owl affiliates for $2.4B all-cash (19% premium), board-approved Apr 2026, closing Q2/Q3 2026 pending shareholder vote. Clean near-dated arb.

Sionna Therapeutics has two CF readouts on track for summer 2026 (SION-719 PreciSION-CF Ph2a NBD1-stabilizer add-on to Trikafta; SION-451 Ph1 dual-combo), funded into 2028; genuine dated binary, asymmetry hinges on add-on benefit vs SoC.

SkyWater being acquired by IonQ at $35/sh ($15 cash + $20 IonQ stock with collar); shareholders approved May 8 2026, closing Q2-Q3 2026 pending regulatory. Complicated arb - value tracks IonQ stock within collar + CHIPS upside.

Silicon Labs signed definitive all-cash deal with TI at $231.00/sh ($7.5B), unanimous boards Feb 4 2026, but close not until 1H 2027 - the trade is spread capture + connectivity-overlap antitrust deal-break risk over a long timeline.

verified.catalyst: NDV-01 (sustained-release gem/doce for NMIBC) advances into the Phase 3 RESCUE registrational program with first pivotal 3-month CR data due year-end 2026 from the single-arm 2L BCG-unresponsive pathway.
verified.dated_milestone: Phase 3 RESCUE initiation (IND filing + enrollment, ~80 N. American sites) on track for ~mid-2026; first dated value-readout = initial 3-month CR data from the 2L BCG-unresponsive registrational pathway at YE 2026.
verified.instrument: equity (NASDAQ:RLMD); long-dated calls plausible given binary clinical setup, but small-cap ($436M mkt cap) — option liquidity to be confirmed before sizing.
verified.bloom_gates: G3 — a specific, dated, currently-unpriced figure: the YE-2026 Phase 3 3-month CR rate from the pivotal 2L pathway. Not G1 (no named counterparty) or G2 (the $160M/$234M financing is already done and priced).
verified.edge: M — well-funded to 2029 ($234M, completes Phase 3) and dated registrational readout exists, but the proximate ~mid-2026 milestone is a trial START (low information; starts rarely move on efficacy) and the value-bearing YE-2026 readout is ~6+ months out with a bar largely set by already-disclosed P2 CR (76-80%).
verified.primary_source: Relmada Q1 2026 results press release, StockTitan, May 12, 2026 ("Initial 3-month NDV-01 data from Phase 3 2L BCG-unresponsive study – YE 2026"; "$234.0M cash... fund operations through 2029, including completion of the Phase 3 RESCUE program"); corroborated by Seeking Alpha "Relmada targets mid-2026 Phase 3 RESCUE start backed by $234M cash runway through 2029," May 2026.
verified.analysis: Triage correctly flagged this as a trial-start rather than a readout, but verification shows a genuine dated registrational data event behind it: initial 3-month CR from the single-arm 2L BCG-unresponsive Phase 3 pathway is guided to YE 2026 — forward, unpriced, idiosyncratic, clearing the strict gate (G3). The strong Phase 2 data (76-80% 12-mo CR) is already fired and drove the re-rate from $0.52 to ~$6, so the proximate ~mid-2026 trial START is low-information and the value-readout is ~6 months out. Funding is a non-issue ($234M cash, runway through 2029 covering full Phase 3), making this a legitimate WATCH to escalate as the YE-2026 readout nears, not an ACTIVE call on a low-info start.

verified.catalyst: Rumble's all-stock (2.0281 RUM/share) acquisition of Frankfurt-listed Northern Data AG, anchored by Tether, with closing expected mid-June 2026.
verified.dated_milestone: Offer period already closed June 1, 2026; mechanical settlement/closing expected mid-June 2026 (no further tender milestone remains).
verified.instrument: none (RUM is acquirer issuing fixed-ratio stock; arb leg was Northern Data, now closed)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty: Northern Data AG, backer Tether) and G2 (concrete commitment: signed business combination, all regulatory approvals received) are met, but both are backward-looking; no unfired G3 figure remains.
verified.primary_source: Rumble PR "Announces Final Results of Exchange Offer for Northern Data," GlobeNewswire, 2026-06-08; corroborated by Rumble "Receipt of all Regulatory Approvals," 2026-05-05.
verified.analysis: The merger is essentially consummated, not forward: per Rumble's June 8, 2026 final-results PR, the exchange offer expired June 1 and can no longer be accepted, 85.2% of Northern Data is secured, all regulatory approvals are in, and only mechanical mid-June closing/delisting remains. RUM is the acquirer issuing fixed-ratio stock (2.0281 per ND share), so there is no merger-arb spread to capture on RUM, and the event has already re-rated the stock (surged on the Nov-2025 announce, +11.4% May 11, multiple compression articles). The genuine forward angle is post-close AI-cloud execution (~$425M revenue baseline, Tether GPU/ad commitments, June-4 Together AI B300 deal), but that is an operational/AI-capex thesis, not a dated, unfired merger-arb catalyst.

verified.catalyst: RASolute-302 Phase 3 PDAC overall-survival win (daraxonrasib OS 13.2 vs 6.7 mo, HR 0.40, p<0.0001) — but the binary already read out positive and is priced.
verified.dated_milestone: Pivotal data presented at ASCO Plenary + NEJM publication on 2026-05-31 (PAST). Next forward event: NDA submission to FDA — no dated guidance ("future NDA," approval "as early as next year" ≈ 2027); no specific date.
verified.bloom_gates: None pass cleanly. G3 fails: the only currently-unpriced figure would be NDA/approval timing, but there is no specific dated figure (vague 2027); the OS efficacy figures are already public and re-rated.
verified.edge: L — the asymmetry was the trial readout; it printed positive and the stock has already re-rated (yearLow $34 → ~$149, 200d avg $88.79). No remaining dated, unpriced forward leg.
verified.primary_source: Revolution Medicines press release / GlobeNewswire + NEJM, "Daraxonrasib Demonstrates Unprecedented Overall Survival Benefit in Pivotal Phase 3 RASolute 302" (2026-05-31); FDA expanded-access "safe to proceed" letter (2026-05-01).
verified.analysis: The flagged catalyst has FIRED: RASolute-302's unprecedented OS benefit was presented at the ASCO 2026 Plenary and simultaneously published in NEJM on 2026-05-31, with all PFS/OS endpoints declared final, and the FDA expanded-access "safe to proceed" letter landed 2026-05-01 — both in the past. The stock is up ~4x off its 52-week low to a $31.7B cap, confirming the binary is priced in, and it actually traded down ~4% on the verification date (post-event drift). The sole forward item, the NDA filing, lacks any specific dated guidance, so it fails the DATED + concrete-unpriced-figure gate; this is a post-event, post-re-rating name, not a forward binary.

verified.catalyst: Revvity is divesting its China Immunodiagnostics business (~6% of FY2025 revenue) for up to $200M, with a definitive agreement expected in Q2-2026 and close in 2027.
verified.dated_milestone: Definitive agreement expected to be signed Q2-2026 (by ~early July 2026); close in 2027 pending regulatory approval. Next watch: Goldman Sachs Healthcare Conf Jun 9, 2026 (CEO) for status.
verified.bloom_gates: G2 (signed LOI = concrete commitment to sell, up to $200M) + G3 (specific unpriced figures: $200M proceeds, pro-forma $5.20-5.30 EPS / 28.4% adj op margin). G1 FAILS - counterparty is an unnamed management-led buyer group, not a named third party.
verified.edge: L - small (~6% rev), slow (close 2027), and the directional re-rate already occurred at the May 5 announcement (+2% reaction); MBO-style buyer adds execution/valuation uncertainty. Only mild forward optionality on the Q2 definitive-agreement signing.
verified.primary_source: RVTY Form 8-K / Q1 2026 press release, filed May 5, 2026 (sec.gov edgar 000003179126000016); LOI signed Apr 16, 2026. Confirmed not-yet-signed definitive agreement as of Jun 6, 2026 via Q1 transcript + StockTitan 8-K summary.
verified.analysis: Real and dated forward catalyst: a signed LOI (Apr 16, 2026) to sell China IDX for up to $200M, with the definitive agreement explicitly expected in Q2-2026 and close in 2027 - confirmed not yet signed as of today. It clears G2/G3 but fails G1 because the buyer is an internal management-led consortium with no named third-party counterparty, and the strategic re-rate already happened on the May 5 announcement (stock +~2%, FY26 guide reset to $5.20-5.30 EPS). Net: a legitimate WATCH (not a macro bet), but low edge given small scale, the 2027 close, the unpriced upside being modest, and the announcement catalyst being largely behind it - the only fresh trigger is the Q2 definitive signing.

verified.catalyst: RYAM is running a formal strategic-alternatives review (possible sale/merger/strategic investment) with Morgan Stanley + Wachtell, launched after unsolicited interest and an abrupt CEO exit.
verified.dated_milestone: Process launched Apr-20-2026; Board has set NO timetable and won't update unless legally required — next hard checkpoint is Q2 earnings (~early Aug 2026), no committed decision date.
verified.instrument: equity (small-cap, ~$546M mkt cap, $8.10; thin/illiquid, options low-OI — equity preferred over calls)
verified.bloom_gates: None fully met — G1 fails (no named counterparty, only generic "unsolicited indications of interest"); G2 fails (Board explicitly refuses a timetable and may continue standalone, no concrete commitment); G3 fails (no disclosed offer price or SOTP figure). Borderline G1 only on the abstract acknowledgment of unnamed inbound interest.
verified.primary_source: Businesswire / RYAM 8-K press release "Announces Comprehensive Strategic Alternatives Review" (Apr-20-2026); confirmed no update via StockTitan RYAM news through May-14-2026; FMP quote $8.10 (-5.3%) timestamp Jun-6-2026.
verified.analysis: The catalyst is genuine, specific, dated and forward (Apr-20-2026 Morgan Stanley + Wachtell strategic review, triggered by unsolicited interest and CEO Sutton's Apr-16 resignation) and is not a macro bet, and it is not yet fired or re-rated — the stock has actually drifted down (~$8.10, -5% on the verification day) amid a weak Q1 ($81M net loss, $8M EBITDA). However it fails the strict Bloom gates: no named acquirer (G1), no concrete commitment or timetable — the Board expressly declined one and "continue standalone" remains an explicit option (G2) — and no disclosed price/SOTP figure (G3), so it is the weakest "review-announced" form of M&A optionality. As of June 2026 the only post-launch news (May 5 Q1, May 14 new Non-Executive Chair Julie Dill) shows no bidder, offer or agreement, keeping this WATCH not ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: Seabridge Gold is in advanced talks to bring a senior JV partner into its ~$33B-NPV KSM gold-copper developer in BC, with management/Cantor guiding a deal in H1 2026.
verified.dated_milestone: KSM JV-partner agreement guided "H1 2026" (window closes ~end-June 2026); no firm date — next hard checkpoint is Q2/H1 expiry and any updated guidance on the Aug 2026 Q2 call.
verified.instrument: equity (NYSE: SA / TSX: SEA); long-dated calls viable but high gold/copper beta
verified.bloom_gates: G2 partial (preferred partner "participating with technical team... formalizing partnership agreement," per Mar-2026 Cantor/mgmt), G3 partial (SA ~10-12% of KSM spot NPV per Apr-10 SA thesis); G1 FAILS — counterparty never named, only "major mining company / preferred partner."
verified.edge: M — real structural re-rating optionality if JV lands, but no named counterparty (G1 fail), soft H1/26 date with prior slippage, and the "suppressed" premise is half-spent (stock ran 2x to $40 high; SA thesis "12c on the dollar" already partly worked).
verified.primary_source: FMP/Newsfile: KSM named BC priority project (Apr 30, 2026); Valor spin-out closed (Jun 3, 2026); MTT permit delayed (Apr 10, 2026); Stonegate/Cantor coverage + SeekingAlpha "12c on the dollar, JV = key catalyst" (Apr 10-13, 2026); Streetwise "Finding a Partner... still top goal" (Mar 10, 2026).
verified.analysis: The genuine forward catalyst is the KSM senior JV-partner deal, guided to H1 2026 with a "preferred partner" already embedded in the technical team — real and idiosyncratic, but the counterparty is unnamed (G1 fail) and the date is a soft window expiring in ~3 weeks with no firm trigger, while the MTT construction permit was just DELAYED (Apr 10). The other two legs the triage leans on are already fired: the Valor Gold (Courageous Lake) spin-out CLOSED June 3, 2026 (today's apparent -13.6% in SA is the mechanical spin-out value distribution, not adverse news), and the Sprott US$150M NSR royalty closed back in 2023. Clears WATCH on a legitimate soft-dated structural catalyst, but not ACTIVE given the G1 miss, slippage-prone window, and a re-rate that is partly in the price.

verified.catalyst: EchoStar is monetizing spectrum via signed agreements with AT&T ($22.65B cash) and SpaceX (~$22B) to resolve its going-concern/2026 maturity wall, but the bulk of the cash consideration is dated to the Nov 30, 2027 Spectrum Acquisition Closing, not mid-2026.
verified.dated_milestone: AT&T spectrum sale regulatory/FCC-DOJ close targeted H1-2026 (next near-term gate); transformative cash at the Spectrum Acquisition Closing dated Nov 30, 2027.
verified.instrument: equity (common); long-dated calls if playing the 2027 de-leveraging completion
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparties AT&T + SpaceX) and G2 (concrete signed $22.65B / ~$22B purchase commitments) are satisfied; G3 is NOT (the ~$42.6B figure is the central, heavily-covered thesis, not a currently-unpriced number).
verified.edge: L — the catalyst is largely re-rated (stock jumped ~70% on the Aug-2025 AT&T announcement) and the transformative cash inflow is targeted Nov-30-2027, so what remains forward in 2026 is the regulatory/structural close of an already-priced, widely-followed deal rather than an unpriced surprise.
verified.primary_source: EchoStar Q1-2026 Form 10-Q (period ended 2026-03-31, filed ~May 2026, going-concern + maturities) and Form 8-K dated 2026-05-22 (Spectrum Transfer Closing completed); AT&T $22.65B deal announced 2025-08-26.
verified.analysis: G1/G2 are genuinely met — AT&T ($22.65B) and SpaceX (~$22B, ~$20B at close + ~$2B interim debt-service) are named counterparties with signed agreements addressing a real going-concern situation ($6.13B of 2026 maturities vs $1.52B cash per the Q1-2026 10-Q). However, the triage's "final AT&T tranches close mid-2026" framing overstates the near-term: the May-22-2026 Spectrum Transfer Closing already happened (milestone fired) and the actual Total Consideration Amount / deleveraging cash is dated to the Nov-30-2027 Spectrum Acquisition Closing. Because the equity already re-rated ~70% on the August-2025 AT&T announcement and the figures are the consensus thesis (failing G3-unpriced), this is a known, priced distressed-monetization play that warrants WATCH rather than a fresh ACTIVE fire.

verified.catalyst: KKR's exclusive takeover talks for SBA Communications (~$250/sh, Brookfield earlier linked) were paused on ~May 12, 2026 over valuation/equity-check concerns; no definitive agreement and the deal premium has fully unwound.
verified.dated_milestone: No forward dated milestone; key events are in the past (Apr 2 sale-exploration rumor; ~May 12 KKR "pencils-down" pause). Next checkpoint = Q2 earnings (late Jul/early Aug 2026), not deal-driven.
verified.bloom_gates: G1 partial (KKR named but talks paused, not active); G2 FAIL (no definitive agreement / binding offer — KKR went pencils-down); G3 FAIL (~$250 figure was priced then unwound, not a currently-unpriced forward number)
verified.edge: L — the "live forward merger-arb" premise is false; talks are paused and the premium has fully deflated, so no asymmetric pre-deal entry remains.
verified.primary_source: Green Street Infrastructure report via Seeking Alpha ("SBA Communications sinks near close on report of exclusive talks with KKR") and TIKR ("KKR Paused...at $207"), both dated ~May 12–22, 2026; FMP quote $208.02 as of 2026-06-05/06.
verified.analysis: The triage flag describes live exclusive KKR talks, but multiple sources (Green Street/Seeking Alpha/TIKR, dated to ~May 12, 2026) confirm KKR went "pencils-down" and PAUSED the process over the ~$250/sh valuation and equity-check size; there is no definitive agreement and no confirmed active bidder. The catalyst already FIRED on the April 2 sale-exploration rumor (+14% spike, ran toward ~$250) and then re-rated back DOWN to ~$208 (50-day avg $206) on the pause, meaning the market now prices SBAC as a standalone tower REIT, not as live merger-arb. This fails the strict forward/dated gate — it is a faded, paused deal with no forward catalyst date, so tier NONE.

verified.catalyst: Soracaya (Bolivia) silver project targets Q3-2026 permitting and a small Q4-2026 initial production ramp (~200-250 tpd), alongside Bolivar mine full-recovery also targeted Q4-2026 — but the headline "$64.6M Bolivian sovereign cash recovery" does not exist as a discrete event.
verified.dated_milestone: Soracaya permitting by Q3 2026; Soracaya initial production + Bolivar full-recovery targeted Q4 2026. Next hard date: Q2 2026 financial results (~Aug 2026).
verified.instrument: equity (SCZM / SCZMF OTC; SCZ.V primary, sub-$10 micro-cap)
verified.bloom_gates: None cleared. G1: no named counterparty commitment. G2: no concrete contractual commitment. G3: the "$64.6M" is not a sovereign recovery but the company's own Q1-2026 balance-sheet cash + marketable securities ($42.7M cash + $22.2M US treasuries = $64.9M, already booked), so there is no specific currently-unpriced figure tied to a discrete forward event.
verified.edge: L — the flagship "sovereign recovery" catalyst is a misread of an existing balance-sheet line, and the genuine dated item (Soracaya ramp) is small, soft/operational, and dominated by a silver-price macro bet.
verified.primary_source: Santacruz Silver Q1 2026 results, Newsfilecorp release 297731 (~May 2026, confirms $64.9M cash+securities and NO sovereign recovery); Soracaya Q3/Q4-2026 timeline per SEC Form 6-K (data 0001548536, ex99-1, FY2026) and investor presentation. Price: SCZ.V CAD $8.85 -14.99% on 2026-06-05 (Yahoo Finance).
verified.analysis: The triage's central claim — a ~$64.6M Bolivian sovereign cash recovery — is not corroborated by any filing or release; it is a misattribution of Santacruz's own Q1-2026 "cash and highly-liquid marketable securities of $64.9M" (Newsfilecorp release 297731, dated ~May 2026), which is existing assets on the books, not a forward government recovery. What remains real and dated is the Soracaya project (Q3-2026 permitting, Q4-2026 initial production at a conservative 200-250 tpd) and Bolivar's Q4-2026 full-recovery, both confirmed in the company's investor materials/SEC 6-K — but these are soft, execution-dependent operational milestones layered on a silver-price macro thesis, and the stock's -15% move June 5 (SCZ.V CAD $8.85) reflects commodity/sentiment beta, not a discrete priced catalyst. Fails the strict gate: no named-counterparty/contractual commitment and no specific currently-unpriced figure tied to a discrete event, so NONE / score 3.

verified.catalyst: Insider-led take-private of Select Medical at $16.50/share cash (~$3.9B EV) by an Ortenzio/Jackson/WCAS consortium, pending the stockholder vote.
verified.dated_milestone: Special stockholder vote June 26, 2026; expected close mid-2026 (HSR already cleared, no financing condition).
verified.instrument: none (common-stock arb only; spread is negative)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty: Ortenzio/Jackson/WCAS consortium) — but G3 FAILS: $16.50 is fully priced, no currently-unpriced figure remains.
verified.edge: L — stock $16.54 trades $0.04 (~0.24%) THROUGH the $16.50 deal; arb spread is negative and the upside is already de-risked. Deal has no go-shop and is an insider MBO, so a topping bid is structurally unlikely; the only forward 'catalyst' (a bump) is the least probable outcome.
verified.primary_source: PRNewswire deal announcement, Select Medical to be acquired by Ortenzio/Jackson/WCAS consortium at $16.50/share, dated Mar 2, 2026; vote date per SEC PRER14A proxy / StockTitan, June 26, 2026; live quote $16.54 (FMP, 2026-06-06).
verified.analysis: The corporate event is real, dated, and has a named acquirer (G1), but it is not a forward, unpriced opportunity: at $16.54 the stock already trades above the $16.50 cash consideration, so there is no merger-arb spread left to capture and downside-from-deal-break is the dominant remaining risk rather than upside. Because this is an insider-led MBO (co-founder Ortenzio + Jackson + WCAS rolling over) with no go-shop, no CVR, and no price-adjustment, a topping bid is structurally improbable, so the only path to upside (a price bump) is the least likely outcome; the BFA/Bleichmar 'fiduciary' investigations are routine plaintiff-firm boilerplate, not a credible bump catalyst. With the spread gone and no live forward edge, this fails the forward/unpriced gate despite being a genuine dated merger.

verified.catalyst: CSN's board-authorized R$15-18B divestiture program (sale of CSN Cimentos control + a relevant CSN Infraestrutura stake), backstopped by a binding US$1.2-1.4B senior-secured credit facility, with binding offers due end-June and signing targeted Q3/Q4 2026 — a deleveraging of multiples of the ~$1.56B equity cap.
verified.dated_milestone: Binding offers due end-June 2026; signing targeted Q3/Q4 2026; cash disbursement/closing by year-end 2026 (subject to CADE/regulatory approval).
verified.instrument: equity (NYSE: SID ADR / B3: CSNA3); levered/small-cap equity gives the deleveraging convexity — long-dated calls viable but ADR options thin
verified.bloom_gates: G2 primary (board-authorized program + signed binding US$1.2-1.4B syndicated facility commitment letter); G3 (R$15-18B gross-debt reduction vs ~$1.56B equity cap = unpriced deleveraging asymmetry on a 3.36x-levered balance sheet); G1 partial (Morgan Stanley/Conch advising; bidders Votorantim/J&F/Anhui Conch/Huaxin/Sinoma named but no signed counterparty yet).
verified.edge: M — specific, dated, board-authorized and SEC-filed (not rumor), with genuine equity convexity from high leverage; capped below H because no binding sale is signed, proceeds (>R$10B / up to ~$2-3B) and timing carry regulatory/execution risk, and the catalyst is gradually being telegraphed (S&P/Reuters coverage), so it is partly in the tape.
verified.primary_source: CSN SEC Form 6-K filings (data CIK 0001049659; 2026-01-14, 2026-03-20, and 1Q26 press release) re program + US$1.2-1.4B facility; S&P Global (2026-01-16) and Reuters via Investing.com (2026-04-14) on sale process, valuation (>R$10B) and Q3/Q4-2026 signing target.
verified.kill_fact: Core thesis holds and is forward/un-fired, but the LINE's load-bearing date is WRONG: it says binding offers due "end-June," yet multiple June 3 2026 primary sources (cemnet, globalcement, globalbankingandfinance) confirm binding offers for CSN Cimentos are due AUGUST 7, 2026 — the LINE anchored on stale Apr 14 coverage. Other corrections: (a) the US$1.2-1.4B facility is a SECURED SYNDICATED facility to REFINANCE existing debt (secured partly by cement assets), not an explicitly senior-secured pre-funded 'backstop' for the divestiture as the LINE frames it; (b) bidder list is stale — J&F and Suzano have DROPPED OUT; live contenders are Votorantim, Italcementi, Sinoma, Huaxin (Anhui Conch unconfirmed); (c) cement sale mooted ~R$10B/~US$1.98B, at the low end of the LINE's '$2-3B.' CONFIRMED: SID live at $1.18 / -9.23% / yr-low $1.11 / $1.56B cap (exact match, so deleveraging optionality is genuinely un-re-rated); board-authorized R$15-18B plan (Jan 15 2026, S&P Global), Cimentos-control + Infraestrutura-stake sale, Morgan Stanley advising, deal UNSIGNED with signing targeted Q3/Q4 2026 — a real idiosyncratic restructuring catalyst, not macro/steel-price. Tradeability caveat real: ADR options thin.
verified.analysis: CSN has a board-authorized, SEC-6-K-disclosed plan to cut gross debt by R$15-18B by selling control of CSN Cimentos (Morgan Stanley advising; >R$10B / up to ~$2-3B mooted; bidders include Votorantim, J&F, Anhui Conch) plus a CSN Infraestrutura stake, pre-funded by a binding US$1.2-1.4B senior-secured facility — a deleveraging of multiples of the ~$1.56B equity cap on a ~3.36x-levered B/S, which is the real asymmetry. As of the latest dated coverage (Reuters/Investing, Apr 14 2026) nothing is signed; the deal is moving from non-binding to binding (offers due end-June), with signing targeted Q3/Q4 and cash by year-end 2026, so it remains forward and un-fired. SID is at $1.18, down 9.2% on the day and near its 52-wk low ($1.11), confirming the deleveraging optionality is not yet re-rated into the equity; it is an idiosyncratic restructuring catalyst, not a macro/steel-price bet, though execution and CADE/regulatory approval are the key risks.

verified.catalyst: Sila Realty Trust take-private by Blue Owl affiliates at $30.38/share all-cash ($2.4B), board-approved Apr 20 2026, shareholder vote June 26 2026.
verified.dated_milestone: Special shareholder meeting to approve the merger on June 26, 2026; expected close Q2/Q3 2026.
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty: Blue Owl affiliates / Sunshine Holding REIT LLC), G2 (concrete commitment: signed definitive merger agreement, $30.38 cash), G3 (specific figure: $30.38 deal price) all pass on specificity, but the figure is no longer unpriced.
verified.edge: L — deal terms fully public since Apr 20; stock already re-rated $25.53 -> $30.25, leaving only ~$0.13 (~0.43%) gross spread to the $30.38 price with the vote ~3 weeks out. Arb essentially closed; no fresh forward move.
verified.primary_source: BusinessWire / SEC Form 8-K & DEFM14A — "Sila Realty Trust to be Acquired by Affiliates of Blue Owl for $2.4 Billion," April 20, 2026; special meeting set June 26, 2026 (DEFM14A); current quote $30.25 (FMP, 2026-06-06).
verified.analysis: Real, dated, board-approved all-cash take-private by named counterparty (Blue Owl) with hard milestone (June 26 2026 vote) — Bloom gates pass on specificity. But it has already fired: SILA re-rated from $25.53 pre-announce to $30.25 now, leaving only ~0.43% gross spread to the $30.38 price. The residual is a thin annualized arb for existing holders, not an unpriced forward move, so it gates to WATCH not ACTIVE.
